outcome.title: Integration Review
outcome.description: Find the integral of a function using substitution and/or algebra.

outcome.title: Integration by Parts
outcome.description: Find the integral of a function using integration by parts (and substitution when appropriate).

outcome.title: Integral of Trigonometric Functions
outcome.description: Find the integral of trigonometric functions using identities, parts and/or substitution.

outcome.title: Trigonometric Substitution
outcome.description: Find the integral of algebraic functions via trigonometric substitution.

outcome.title: Partial Fractions
outcome.description: Find the integral of rational functions via partial fraction decomposition.

outcome.title: Select a Strategy
outcome.description: Identify the appropriate integration technique(s) and apply them to integrate a function.

outcome.title: Improper Integrals as Limits
outcome.description: Write an improper integral as the limit of a proper definite integral to compute the value.

outcome.title: Improper Integrals via p-test and Comparison Theorem
outcome.description: Use the p-test and the Comparison Theorem for integrals to determine if an improper integral converges.

outcome.title: Sequence Formulas
outcome.description: Define and use explicit and recursive formulas for sequences.

outcome.title: Sequence Properties and Limits
outcome.description: Determine if a sequence is convergent, divergent, monotonic, or bounded, and compute limits of convergent sequences.

outcome.title: Closed Forms
outcome.description: Find the closed form for a partial sum series and use it to evaluate an infinite series.

outcome.title: Integral Test
outcome.description: Apply the integral test to determine if a series converges or diverges.

outcome.title: Direct Comparison Test
outcome.description: Apply the direct comparison test to determine if a series converges or diverges.

outcome.title: Limit Comparison Test
outcome.description: Apply the limit comparison test to determine if a series converges or diverges.

outcome.title: Alternating Series Test
outcome.description: Determine if a series is absolutely convergent, conditionally convergent or divergent.

outcome.title: Ratio and Root Test
outcome.description: Use the ratio or root test to determine if a series is absolutely convergent or divergent.

outcome.title: Intervals of Convergence
outcome.description: Find the radius of convergence of a power series.

outcome.title: Power Series of a Function
outcome.description: Find the power series of a function.

outcome.title: Closed Form for a Power Series
outcome.description: Find the closed form for a power series.

outcome.title: Evaluate Limits using Power Series
outcome.description: Evaluate the limit of a series using power series.

outcome.title: Power Series via Taylor Series
outcome.description: Work with power series derived via Taylor series.

outcome.title: Closed Forms for Taylor Series
outcome.description: Find the closed form of power series derived via Taylor series.

outcome.title: Evaluate Limits using Power Series derived via Taylor Series
outcome.description: Evaluate the limit of a series using power series derived via Taylor series.

outcome.title: General Power Series of Functions
outcome.description: Find the power series of a variety of functions.

outcome.title: General Closed Form of a Power Series
outcome.description: Find the closed form for a variety of power series.

outcome.title: Taylor Series and Taylor Polynomials
outcome.description: Interpret a power series as a Taylor series.

outcome.title: Polar Coordinates
outcome.description: Convert points and equations between polar and Cartesian coordinates and equations.

outcome.title: Polar Arclength
outcome.description: Compute arclengths of curves given in polar coordinates.

outcome.title: Polar Area
outcome.description: Compute area of curves given in polar coordinates.
